commands.review_summary:
The branch adds shared gateway startup close constants, uses them in the startup-pending WebSocket close path, demotes the matching pre-connect close log to debug, adds a regression assertion and changelog entry, and types a daemon install auth mock.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main gives a high-confidence path: force startup readiness pending, send a connect request, receive retryable UNAVAILABLE, then observe the queued 1013 close flow into the generic pre-connect WARN branch.
